title: FLUX.2 Pro
description: Generate images using Black Forest Labs FLUX.2 Pro via OpenRouter.

userSettings.name: openrouterApiKey
userSettings.label: OpenRouter API Key
userSettings.description: Your OpenRouter API key. Get one at openrouter.ai/keys.

pluginFunctions.code: async function generate_image_flux(params,userSettings){const{prompt}=params;const apiKey=userSettings.openrouterApiKey;if(!apiKey)throw new Error('OpenRouter API key required.');if(!prompt)throw new Error('Prompt required.');const response=await fetch('https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/images',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json','Authorization':`Bearer ${apiKey}`,'HTTP-Referer':window.location.origin||'https://typingmind.com','X-Title':'TypingMind Plugin'},body:JSON.stringify({model:'black-forest-labs/flux.2-pro',prompt,output_format:params.output_format||'jpeg'})});if(response.status===401)throw new Error('Invalid OpenRouter API key.');if(!response.ok){const text=await response.text();let msg=`Request failed (${response.status})`;try{const e=JSON.parse(text);if(e.error)msg+=`: ${e.error.message||e.error}`;}catch(_){msg+=`: ${text}`;}throw new Error(msg);}const{data}=await response.json();if(!data?.length)throw new Error('No images returned.');return{cards:data.map(img=>({type:'image',image:{url:img.url||`data:image/${params.output_format||'jpeg'};base64,${img.b64_json}`,alt:prompt.replace(/[\[\]]/g,''),sync:true}}))}}
pluginFunctions.name: generate_image_flux

openaiSpec.name: generate_image_flux

prompt.description: Text description of the image to generate.

output_format.description: Output format. Use png for lossless quality, jpeg for smaller size.

openaiSpec.description: Generate a high-quality image using Black Forest Labs FLUX.2 Pro via OpenRouter. Supports jpeg or png output.

overviewMarkdown:
# FLUX.2 Pro

High-end image generation via Black Forest Labs FLUX.2 Pro on OpenRouter.

## Parameters
- **output_format**: `jpeg` · `png` (default `jpeg`)

## Setup
1. Get an API key at [openrouter.ai/keys](https://openrouter.ai/keys)
2. Enter it in plugin settings
